description: Historical datalogger - daily and monthly trends for each MPPT solar controller

targets.query:
_s = "${serial_number}"
from(bucket: "solar_history")
  |> range(start: -35d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "datalogger_summary")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "recorded_days")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => _s == "$__all" or _s == "" or r.serial_number == _s)
  |> last()
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_field"])

_s = "${serial_number}"
from(bucket: "solar_history")
  |> range(start: -35d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "datalogger_summary")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "days_with_lvd")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => _s == "$__all" or _s == "" or r.serial_number == _s)
  |> last()
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_field"])

_s = "${serial_number}"
from(bucket: "solar_history")
  |> range(start: -35d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "datalogger_summary")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "months_without_full_charge")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => _s == "$__all" or _s == "" or r.serial_number == _s)
  |> last()
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_field"])

_s = "${serial_number}"
from(bucket: "solar_history")
  |> range(start: -35d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "datalogger_summary")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "avg_morning_soc_pct")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => _s == "$__all" or _s == "" or r.serial_number == _s)
  |> last()
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_field"])

targets.query:

from(bucket: "solar_history")
  |> range(start: -35d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "datalogger_summary")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "total_ah_charge_mah")

  |> last()

targets.query:
_s = "${serial_number}"
from(bucket: "solar_history")
  |> range(start: -35d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "datalogger_summary")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "total_ah_load_mah")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => _s == "$__all" or _s == "" or r.serial_number == _s)
  |> last()
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_field"])

panels.description: One row per recorded day - most recent first

targets.query:
_s = "${serial_number}"
from(bucket: "solar_history")
  |> range(start: -35d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "datalogger_daily")
  |> filter(fn: (r) =>
      r._field == "day_num" or r._field == "soc_pct" or
      r._field == "ah_charge_mah" or r._field == "ah_load_mah" or
      r._field == "vbat_max_mv" or r._field == "vbat_min_mv" or
      r._field == "vpv_max_mv" or r._field == "il_max_ma" or
      r._field == "ext_temp_max_c" or r._field == "ext_temp_min_c" or
      r._field == "nightlength_min" or r._field == "load_disconnect" or
      r._field == "full_charge" or r._field == "pv_over_current" or
      r._field == "load_over_current" or r._field == "battery_over_voltage" or r._field == "low_soc")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => _s == "$__all" or _s == "" or r.serial_number == _s)
  |> group(columns: ["serial_number", "day_index", "_field"])
  |> last()
  |> group()
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["day_index"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> sort(columns: ["day_num"], desc: false)
  |> rename(columns: {
      day_num: "Day", soc_pct: "SOC %",
      ah_charge_mah: "Ah In", ah_load_mah: "Ah Out",
      vbat_max_mv: "V Bat Max", vbat_min_mv: "V Bat Min",
      vpv_max_mv: "V PV Max", il_max_ma: "Load A Max",
      ext_temp_max_c: "T Max °C", ext_temp_min_c: "T Min °C",
      nightlength_min: "Night min"
  })
  |> keep(columns: ["Day","SOC %","Ah In","Ah Out","V Bat Max","V Bat Min","V PV Max","Load A Max","T Max °C","T Min °C","Night min"])

panels.title: 📋 Daily Log Table

targets.query:
_s = "${serial_number}"
from(bucket: "solar_history")
  |> range(start: -35d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "datalogger_daily")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "vbat_min_mv")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => _s == "$__all" or _s == "" or r.serial_number == _s)
  |> group(columns: ["serial_number", "day_index", "_field"])
  |> last()
  |> group()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: time(v: uint(v: now()) - uint(v: (30 - int(v: r.day_index)) * 86400000000000)), "V Bat Min": r._value}))
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "V Bat Min"])

_s = "${serial_number}"
from(bucket: "solar_history")
  |> range(start: -35d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "datalogger_daily")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "vbat_max_mv")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => _s == "$__all" or _s == "" or r.serial_number == _s)
  |> group(columns: ["serial_number", "day_index", "_field"])
  |> last()
  |> group()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: time(v: uint(v: now()) - uint(v: (30 - int(v: r.day_index)) * 86400000000000)), "V Bat Max": r._value}))
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "V Bat Max"])

panels.description: One row per month - most recent first

targets.query:
_s = "${serial_number}"
from(bucket: "solar_history")
  |> range(start: -400d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "datalogger_monthly")
  |> filter(fn: (r) =>
      r._field == "month_num" or r._field == "soc_pct" or
      r._field == "ah_charge_mah" or r._field == "ah_load_mah" or
      r._field == "vbat_max_mv" or r._field == "vbat_min_mv" or
      r._field == "vpv_max_mv" or r._field == "ipv_max_ma" or
      r._field == "il_max_ma" or r._field == "ext_temp_max_c" or
      r._field == "ext_temp_min_c" or r._field == "nightlength_min" or r._field == "load_disconnect" or
      r._field == "full_charge" or r._field == "pv_over_current" or
      r._field == "load_over_current" or r._field == "battery_over_voltage" or r._field == "low_soc")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => _s == "$__all" or _s == "" or r.serial_number == _s)
  |> group(columns: ["serial_number", "month_index", "_field"])
  |> last()
  |> group()
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["month_index"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> sort(columns: ["month_num"], desc: false)
  |> rename(columns: {
      month_num: "Month", soc_pct: "SOC %",
      ah_charge_mah: "Ah In", ah_load_mah: "Ah Out",
      vbat_max_mv: "V Bat Max", vbat_min_mv: "V Bat Min",
      vpv_max_mv: "V PV Max", ipv_max_ma: "PV A Max",
      il_max_ma: "Load A Max", ext_temp_max_c: "T Max °C",
      ext_temp_min_c: "T Min °C", nightlength_min: "Night min"
  })
  |> keep(columns: ["Month","SOC %","Ah In","Ah Out","V Bat Max","V Bat Min","V PV Max","PV A Max","Load A Max","T Max °C","T Min °C","Night min"])

list.label: Device
list.name: serial_number
list.query:
import "influxdata/influxdb/schema"
union(
  tables: [
    schema.tagValues(bucket: "solar",         tag: "serial_number"),
    schema.tagValues(bucket: "solar_history", tag: "serial_number"),
  ]
) |> distinct(column: "_value")

title: 📊 MPPT Solar - Datalogger
